headline: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization

article.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
article.summary: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

headline: US Stocks Dip as Investors Eye Inflation, Chips Stocks Retreat

article.title: US Stocks Dip as Investors Eye Inflation, Chips Stocks Retreat
article.summary: US stocks fell Monday in midday trading as oil prices rebounded amid doubts about the progress of peace talks between the US and Iran. Yields on 10-year Treasuries touched 4.6% and semiconductor stocks traded lower, with sentiment muted and inflation a key concern.

headline: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises on Doubts Over US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap

article.title: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises on Doubts Over US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street’s rebound attempt failed, with stocks falling as oil climbed after doubts resurfaced about an imminent US-Iran deal that would revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.
